sourceText: Early 20th Century
translatedText: Farkon Karni na 20

sourceText: A brutal childhood, captured on the Kipchak Steppe and sold into slavery.
translatedText: Yarinya mai zalunci, wanda aka kama a kan Kipchak Steppe kuma aka sayar da shi cikin bauta.

sourceText: Rising through the Mamluk ranks through sheer military genius and ambition, ultimately seizing the sultanate and defending the Islamic world.
translatedText: Tashi ta cikin Mamluk yana da hazaka da kishi na soja, daga karshe ya kwace sarauta da kare duniyar Musulunci.

sourceText: 13th Century
translatedText: Karni na 13

sourceText: Saadi Shirazi
translatedText: Ya da Shiraz

sourceText: The Mongol invasion of Persia, which forced him into decades of wandering across the known world.
translatedText: Mamayewar Mongol na Farisa, wanda ya tilasta shi cikin shekarun da suka gabata na yawo a fadin duniya da aka sani.

sourceText: He transformed his experiences as a traveler and observer of humanity into timeless works of poetry and prose.
translatedText: Ya canza abubuwan da ya faru a matsayinsa na matafiyi kuma mai lura da bil'adama zuwa ayyukan wakoki da larabci marasa zamani.

sourceText: 13th Century
translatedText: Karni na 13

sourceText: Sargon of Akkad
translatedText: Sargon of Akkad

sourceText: My path to power was fraught with peril, from my obscure birth to the treachery of King Ur-Zababa of Kish, whom I served.
translatedText: Hanyara ta zuwa mulki tana cike da haɗari, tun daga haifuwata da ba a sani ba har zuwa ha'incin Sarkin Ur-Zababa na Kish, wanda na bauta wa.

sourceText: Through military prowess and divine favor, I overthrew my rivals, united the disparate city-states of Sumer, and forged an empire that stretched across Mesopotamia.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bajintar soja da tagomashin Allah, na kawar da abokan hamayya na, na haɗe jihohin Sumer da ba saɓani, na kafa daular da ta mamaye Mesopotamiya.

sourceText: 24th Century BCE
translatedText: Karni na 24 KZ

sourceText: Constant military pressure from the Roman Empire on my western frontiers and managing the diverse religious landscape within my vast domain.
translatedText: Matsi na soji akai-akai daga Daular Roma a kan iyakokina na yamma da kuma kula da yanayin addini daban-daban a cikin babban yanki na.

sourceText: Achieving a decisive victory at the Battle of Edessa, capturing an emperor, and implementing a policy of religious tolerance that fostered internal stability and growth.
translatedText: Samun gagarumin nasara a Yaƙin Edessa, da kama wani sarki, da aiwatar da manufar juriya na addini wanda ya haifar da kwanciyar hankali da haɓaka cikin gida.

sourceText: 3rd Century Sasanian Empire
translatedText: Daular Sasaniya ta Karni na 3

sourceText: My desperate attempts at reform were met with fierce resistance from conservative forces, particularly the Janissaries and the Ulama, leading to their ultimate failure.
translatedText: Yunkurin neman sauyi na ya fuskanci turjiya mai tsanani daga dakarun 'yan mazan jiya, musamman Janissaries da Malamai, wanda ya kai ga gazawarsu.

sourceText: Though my reign ended in tragedy and my reforms were undone, my vision planted the seeds for the later Tanzimat reforms, which became a crucial foundation for Ottoman modernization.
translatedText: Ko da yake mulkina ya ƙare cikin bala'i kuma aka sake gyara na, hangen nesa na ya shuka iri don gyare-gyaren Tanzimat na baya, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushe ga zamanantar da Ottoman.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 18th - Farkon Ƙarni na 19

sourceText: I ascended the throne in a time of chaos, with my kingdom torn apart by internal strife among the Qizilbash factions and external threats from the Ottomans and Uzbeks.
translatedText: Na hau kan karagar mulki ne a lokacin tashin hankali, tare da wargajewar daular ta da rikicin cikin gida a tsakanin bangarorin Qizilbash da barazanar daular Usmaniyya da Uzbek.

sourceText: I ruthlessly centralized power, creating a standing army of 'ghulams' loyal only to me, breaking the power of the tribal chieftains. Through military genius and shrewd diplomacy, I reclaimed lost territories and ushered in an era of unprecedented prosperity.
translatedText: Na sanya iko cikin rashin tausayi, na samar da runduna ta 'gulami' masu aminci gare ni kadai, ta karya ikon sarakunan kabilanci. Ta hanyar hazaka na soja da diflomasiyya mai wayo, na kwato yankunan da suka ɓace kuma na kawo zamanin wadata da ba a taɓa gani ba.

sourceText: Late 16th - Early 17th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 16 - Farkon Ƙarni na 17

sourceText: Ashurbanipal
translatedText: Ashurbanipal

sourceText: The betrayal of my own brother, Shamash-shum-ukin, which led to a devastating civil war, and the constant need to suppress rebellions across my vast empire.
translatedText: Cin amanar ɗan'uwana, Shamash-shum-ukin, wanda ya haifar da mummunan yaƙin basasa, da kuma buƙatar murkushe tawaye a duk faɗin daulara.

sourceText: Through decisive military victories and a ruthless assertion of power, I crushed the rebellion and restored order, channeling my energy into creating a legacy of culture and knowledge.
translatedText: Ta hanyar nasara na soji da kuma nuna rashin tausayi na iko, na murkushe tawaye da maido da tsari, na ba da kuzarina wajen samar da gadon al'adu da ilimi.

sourceText: 7th Century BCE
translatedText: Karni na 7 KZ

sourceText: Forced into exile in Spain for his nationalist views against British rule.
translatedText: An tilasta masa zuwa gudun hijira a Spain saboda ra'ayinsa na kishin kasa a kan mulkin Birtaniya.

sourceText: He channeled his longing for home into powerful poetry, celebrating Arab history and identity, which solidified his status as a national icon upon his return.
translatedText: Ya ba da sha'awar gida cikin wakoki masu ƙarfi, yana nuna tarihin Larabawa da ainihi, wanda ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na babban jigon ƙasa bayan dawowarsa.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Farkon ƙarni na 20

sourceText: Ahmed Cevdet Pasha
translatedText: Ahmed Cevdet Pasha

sourceText: Witnessing the decline of the empire while navigating the intense conflict between tradition and modernization.
translatedText: Shaida ta koma bayan daular yayin da ake gudanar da tashe-tashen hankula tsakanin al'ada da zamani.

sourceText: Attempting to strengthen the empire's legal and intellectual foundations through comprehensive legal reform and historical scholarship.
translatedText: Ƙoƙarin ƙarfafa tushen shari'a da basirar daular ta hanyar ingantaccen gyaran shari'a da ƙwararren tarihi.

sourceText: 19th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 19

sourceText: Rhazes (Al-Razi)
translatedText: Rhazes (Al-Razi)

sourceText: I faced criticism from religious dogmatists who opposed my rationalist and philosophical views, and I grappled with the limits of medical knowledge in my time.
translatedText: Na fuskanci zargi daga ’yan akidar addini waɗanda suke hamayya da ra’ayi na masu hankali da falsafa, kuma na yi fama da iyakokin ilimin likitanci a lokacina.

sourceText: By championing empirical evidence, conducting meticulous experiments, and documenting my findings, I established new medical truths and defended the pursuit of knowledge through reason.
translatedText: Ta hanyar ba da ƙwaƙƙwaran shaida, gudanar da gwaje-gwaje masu mahimmanci, da kuma tattara bayanan bincikena, na kafa sababbin gaskiyar likita kuma na kare neman ilimi ta hanyar hankali.

sourceText: Islamic Golden Age (9th-10th Century)
translatedText: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci (Karni na 9-10)

sourceText: A devastating civil war against my half-brother, al-Amin, for the caliphate, which fractured the empire.
translatedText: Yaƙin basasa da aka yi da ɗan'uwana, al-Amin, na halifanci, wanda ya rushe daular.

sourceText: By securing military victory and promoting intellectual and cultural unity through the House of Wisdom, I consolidated power and ushered in an unparalleled era of scientific advancement.
translatedText: Ta hanyar tabbatar da nasarar soja da haɓaka haɗin kai na ilimi da al'adu ta hanyar Gidan Hikima, na ƙarfafa iko kuma na kawo wani zamani na ci gaban kimiyya wanda ba zai misaltu ba.

sourceText: Early 9th Century
translatedText: Farkon Karni na 9

sourceText: The loss of many of my extensive writings, including the vast majority of my 30-volume universal history.
translatedText: Asarar da yawa daga cikin manyan rubuce-rubucena, gami da mafi yawan tarihin duniya na juzu'i 30.

sourceText: My surviving works, especially 'The Meadows of Gold', established a new, encyclopedic approach to history and geography that influenced scholars for centuries.
translatedText: Ayyukana da suka tsira, musamman 'The Meadows of Zinariya', sun kafa sabuwar hanya, ta hanyar encyclopedic ga tarihi da labarin kasa wanda ya rinjayi masana shekaru aru-aru.

sourceText: 10th Century, Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Karni na 10, Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci

sourceText: Working with the limited observational tools of my time and challenging the long-held, almost dogmatic, conclusions of Ptolemy.
translatedText: Yin aiki tare da ƙayyadaddun kayan aikin lura na lokaci na da ƙalubalantar dogon lokaci, kusan akida, ƙarshen Ptolemy.

sourceText: Through decades of persistent, meticulous observation and rigorous mathematical analysis, I compiled my own data to refine and correct ancient theories.
translatedText: A cikin shekarun da suka gabata na dagewa, lura mai zurfi da tsauraran bincike na lissafi, na tattara nawa bayanai don gyarawa da gyara tsoffin ka'idoji.

sourceText: 9th-10th Century Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na Karni na 9-10

sourceText: Social prejudice and mockery due to my humble origins and perceived ugliness.
translatedText: Ra'ayin jama'a da ba'a saboda kaskanci na asali da kuma tsinkayar muni.

sourceText: I overcame this through sheer intellectual brilliance, wit, and prolific writing, earning the patronage of caliphs and becoming a leading intellectual.
translatedText: Na shawo kan hakan ne ta hanyar hazaka, hazaka, da rubuce-rubuce masu yawa, na samu goyon bayan halifofi kuma na zama jagorar haziki.

sourceText: 9th Century Abbasid Caliphate
translatedText: Halifancin Abbasiyawa na Karni na 9

sourceText: Faced political persecution and the jealousy of rivals, which led to the confiscation of his personal library and a temporary fall from favor.
translatedText: Fuskantar zalunci na siyasa da kishin abokan hamayya, wanda ya kai ga kwace dakin karatunsa na wucin gadi tare da faduwa na wucin gadi.

sourceText: Through the intervention of a powerful friend and his unwavering commitment to knowledge, he eventually had his library returned and his status restored, allowing him to continue his work.
translatedText: Ta hanyar shiga tsakani na abokinsa mai ƙarfi da himma ga ilimi, a ƙarshe ya mayar da ɗakin karatunsa kuma aka maido da matsayinsa, ya ba shi damar ci gaba da aikinsa.

sourceText: 9th Century Abbasid Caliphate
translatedText: Halifancin Abbasiyawa na Karni na 9

sourceText: Faced intense opposition from established legal schools when he tried to found his own (the Jariri school), which ultimately failed. He was even placed under house arrest in Baghdad in his final years.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga kafaffun makarantun shari'a a lokacin da ya yi kokarin neman nasa (makarantar Jariri), wanda a karshe ya ci tura. Har ma an tsare shi a gidan kurkuku a Bagadaza a cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe.

sourceText: Despite these jurisprudential and political setbacks, he devoted himself fully to his scholarship, producing his monumental works of history and commentary that have endured for centuries.
translatedText: Duk da wannan koma baya na shari'a da siyasa, ya sadaukar da kansa sosai ga karatunsa, inda ya samar da manyan ayyukansa na tarihi da sharhi da suka dawwama shekaru aru-aru.

sourceText: 9th-10th Century, Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Karni na 9-10, Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci

sourceText: Constant threats from rival powers, internal strife, and the immense burden of leading a vast and diverse empire.
translatedText: Barazana akai-akai daga masu adawa da juna, rigingimun cikin gida, da babban nauyin jagorancin daula mai fadi da yawa.

sourceText: Through military prowess, strategic alliances, and a firm vision for a unified Sunni state, I secured the empire's borders and legacy.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bajintar soji, dabarun kawance, da kyakykyawan hangen nesa na dunkulewar kasar Sunna, na tabbatar da iyakoki da gadon masarautar.

sourceText: 11th Century
translatedText: Karni na 11

sourceText: Evliya Çelebi
translatedText: Evliya Celebi

sourceText: Constant threats to my life from wars, plagues, political turmoil, and the sheer dangers of travel in the 17th century.
translatedText: Barazana akai-akai ga rayuwata daga yaƙe-yaƙe, annoba, hargitsin siyasa, da kuma hadurran tafiye-tafiye a ƙarni na 17.

sourceText: My insatiable curiosity, a profound sense of duty to document the world, and the patronage of powerful sultans and pashas allowed me to continue my forty-year journey.
translatedText: Ƙaunar sha'awata, zurfin fahimtar aikina na rubuta duniya, da goyon bayan manyan sarakuna da fastoci sun ba ni damar ci gaba da tafiyata ta shekara arba'in.

sourceText: 17th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 17

sourceText: Ibrahim Muteferrika
translatedText: Ibrahim Muteferrika

sourceText: Religious and social resistance to printing, coupled with technical challenges.
translatedText: Juriya na addini da zamantakewa don bugawa, tare da kalubale na fasaha.

sourceText: Gained official permission through the Sultan's patronage and persistent advocacy, successfully establishing his press.
translatedText: Ya samu izini a hukumance ta hanyar goyon bayan Sarkin Musulmi da kuma dagewar dagewa, inda ya samu nasarar kafa jaridarsa.

sourceText: 18th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 18

sourceText: Ibrahim Pasha of Egypt
translatedText: Ibrahim Pasha na Masar

sourceText: The constant intervention of European powers, which ultimately forced me to relinquish my conquest of Syria and thwarted my father's grand ambitions for a regional empire.
translatedText: Rikicin da kasashen turai ke yi a kai a kai, wanda a karshe ya tilasta ni na janye yakin da na yi wa Syria, ya kuma dakile babban burin mahaifina na samun daular yankin.

sourceText: Through decisive military victories and effective administration in the lands I conquered, I demonstrated Egypt's power and laid the groundwork for its modern statehood, even if my rule was brief.
translatedText: Ta hanyar gagarumin nasarori na soji da gudanar da ingantaccen mulki a ƙasashen da na ci, na nuna ikon Masar, na kuma aza harsashin zama ƙasarta ta zamani, ko da kuwa mulkina kaɗan ne.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Misunderstanding and condemnation from orthodox scholars who found my teachings controversial.
translatedText: Rashin fahimta da kuma tofin Allah tsine daga malaman addinin muslunci wadanda suka sami sabani akan koyarwa na.

sourceText: Through unwavering focus on inner spiritual experience, divine inspiration, and prolific writing to clarify my insights for posterity.
translatedText: Ta hanyar mayar da hankali ga ruhi na ciki, wahayi na allahntaka, da rubuce-rubuce masu yawa don fayyace fahimtata ga zuriya.

sourceText: 12th-13th Century
translatedText: Karni na 12-13

sourceText: Losing my father as a child and living as a fugitive, and the crushing defeat at the Battle of Chaldiran.
translatedText: Rasa mahaifina tun yana yaro da rayuwa a matsayin gudun hijira, da mugun shan kaye a yakin Kaldiya.

sourceText: Rallying the loyal Qizilbash tribes to build an empire and uniting my people through faith and poetry.
translatedText: Ƙirƙirar ƙabilun Qizilbash masu aminci don gina daula da haɗin kan jama'ata ta hanyar imani da waƙa.

sourceText: Late 15th - Early 16th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 15th - Farkon Ƙarni na 16

sourceText: Jamal al-Din al-Afghani
translatedText: Jamal al-Din al-Afghani

sourceText: Witnessing the division and decline of the Islamic world under the pressure of European imperialism.
translatedText: Shaidawa rarrabuwar kawuna da koma bayan duniyar Musulunci a karkashin matsin daular Turawa.

sourceText: By advocating for Pan-Islamic unity and promoting internal reform through a rationalist interpretation of Islam.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bayar da shawarar hadin kai tsakanin kasashen musulmi da inganta yin kwaskwarima a cikin gida ta hanyar fassarar Musulunci na son zuciya.

sourceText: Late 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi karni na 19

sourceText: Political persecution and secrecy
translatedText: Zaluntar siyasa da sirri

sourceText: Establishing scientific methodology
translatedText: Kafa hanyoyin kimiyya

sourceText: Islamic Golden Age (8th-9th Century)
translatedText: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci (karni na 8-9)

sourceText: Ziya Gökalp
translatedText: Ziya Gokalp

sourceText: I endured profound mental anguish during the decline of the Ottoman Empire and was imprisoned and exiled for my political beliefs and activities with the Young Turks.
translatedText: Na jimre da baƙin ciki mai tsanani a lokacin daular Ottoman ta rushe kuma aka tsare ni a kurkuku da kuma gudun hijira saboda imani na siyasa da ayyukana tare da matasan Turkawa.

sourceText: I channeled my struggles into a coherent ideology—'Turkification, Islamization, Modernization'—which I spread through my writings, ultimately shaping the intellectual foundations of the new Turkish Republic.
translatedText: Na mayar da gwagwarmayata zuwa wata akida wacce ta dace da ita—’Turkiyya, Musulunci, Zamantakewa’—wanda na yada ta cikin rubuce-rubucena, inda daga karshe na tsara tushen tunani na sabuwar Jamhuriyar Turkiyya.

sourceText: Early 20th Century
translatedText: Farkon Karni na 20

sourceText: Karim Khan Zand
translatedText: Karim Khan Zand

sourceText: Navigating the treacherous civil wars and chaos that followed the assassination of Nader Shah.
translatedText: Yakin basasa na yaudara da hargitsi da suka biyo bayan kisan Nader Shah.

sourceText: By combining military prowess with a policy of clemency and justice, I unified much of Iran and established a stable, prosperous state.
translatedText: Ta hanyar hada bajintar soji da manufar jin kai da adalci, na hade da yawa daga cikin Iran tare da kafa kasa mai zaman lafiya da kwanciyar hankali.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Karni na 18

sourceText: Katip Çelebi
translatedText: Katip Çelebi

sourceText: Interruption of scholarly pursuits due to military campaigns and bureaucratic duties.
translatedText: Katse ayyukan ilimi saboda yakin neman zabe da ayyukan hukuma.

sourceText: Using an inheritance to devote his life entirely to scholarship, producing monumental works.
translatedText: Yin amfani da gado don sadaukar da rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya ga malanta, yana samar da manyan ayyuka.

sourceText: 17th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 17

sourceText: The humiliating defeat of my grand invasion of Greece, particularly at Salamis and Plataea.
translatedText: Abin kunya na babban mamayewa na Girka, musamman a Salamis da Plataea.

sourceText: Shifting focus from military expansion to internal administration and grand construction projects to solidify my rule and legacy.
translatedText: Maida hankali daga faɗaɗa aikin soja zuwa aikin cikin gida da manyan ayyukan gine-gine don ƙarfafa mulkina da gadona.

sourceText: Achaemenid Empire
translatedText: Daular Achaemenid

sourceText: Thabit ibn Qurra
translatedText: Thabit bin Qura

sourceText: Forced to leave his native Harran due to religious disputes, his Sabian beliefs often put him at odds with the mainstream Islamic community.
translatedText: An tilasta masa barin garinsu Harran saboda rikice-rikice na addini, akidar sa ta Sabiya ta kan sa shi sabani da al'ummar Islama.

sourceText: He found patronage under the Banu Musa brothers in Baghdad, where his genius was recognized, allowing him to flourish as a leading scholar in the House of Wisdom.
translatedText: Ya samu sarauta a karkashin ’yan’uwan Banu Musa a Bagadaza, inda aka gane hazakarsa, wanda ya ba shi damar bunkasa a matsayinsa na babban malami a gidan hikima.

sourceText: 9th Century Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na Karni na 9

sourceText: Social oppression and religious persecution for her beliefs and for being a woman, leading to imprisonment and estrangement from her family.
translatedText: Zaluntar jama'a da zaluncin addini saboda akidarta da kasancewarta mace, wanda ya kai ga dauri da nisantar danginta.

sourceText: She found strength in her profound faith and expressed her convictions through powerful poetry, ultimately facing martyrdom with unwavering courage for her ideals.
translatedText: Ta sami ƙarfi a cikin zurfafan bangaskiyarta kuma ta bayyana ra'ayoyinta ta hanyar waƙa masu ƙarfi, a ƙarshe ta fuskanci shahada tare da jajircewa mara ƙasƙanci ga manufofinta.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: The struggle to maintain artistic integrity and find stable patronage amidst the political turmoil between the Ottoman and Safavid empires.
translatedText: Gwagwarmayar tabbatar da mutuncin fasaha da samun kwanciyar hankali a cikin rudanin siyasa tsakanin daular Ottoman da Safavid.

sourceText: Transforming personal suffering and worldly instability into profound poetic expressions of universal human emotion and divine love, finding solace in his art.
translatedText: Canza wahalhalu da rashin zaman lafiya na duniya zuwa manyan maganganun wakoki na motsin ɗan adam na duniya da ƙauna na Allah, samun kwanciyar hankali a cikin fasaharsa.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 16

sourceText: The profound disappointment and betrayal after Sultan Mahmud of Ghazni failed to honor his promise of payment for the 'Shahnameh'.
translatedText: Babban abin takaici da cin amana bayan Sultan Mahmud na Ghazni ya kasa cika alkawarin da ya yi na biyan 'Shahnameh'.

sourceText: He found solace and purpose in the enduring legacy of his work, knowing it would preserve Persian culture and language for generations.
translatedText: Ya sami kwanciyar hankali da manufa a cikin ɗorewar gadon aikinsa, sanin cewa zai kiyaye al'adun Farisa da harshen Farisa ga tsararraki.

sourceText: 10th-11th Century
translatedText: Karni na 10-11

sourceText: Despite my service, I was ensnared by political intrigue and ultimately faced a tragic, unjust end.
translatedText: Duk da hidimata, na shiga cikin tarko na siyasa kuma a ƙarshe na fuskanci mummunan ƙarshe na rashin adalci.

sourceText: I compiled my life's work, decades of seafaring knowledge and collected charts, into my 'Book of Navigation' and my world maps, ensuring my discoveries would outlive me.
translatedText: Na tattara ayyukan rayuwata, shekarun da suka gabata na ilimin teku da tattara jadawalin, cikin 'Littafin Kewayawa' da taswirorin duniya na, na tabbatar da bincikena zai wuce ni.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 16

sourceText: Harun al-Rashid
translatedText: Haruna Rashid

sourceText: Constant warfare with the Byzantine Empire, political intrigue and betrayals within my own court, and the eventual conflict between my sons over succession were great burdens during my rule.
translatedText: Yaƙi na yau da kullun da Daular Rumawa, makirci na siyasa da cin amana a cikin kotuna, da kuma rikici tsakanin ƴaƴana kan magaji sun kasance manyan nauyi a lokacin mulkina.

sourceText: I fostered an era of immense cultural and scientific prosperity by patronizing the arts and establishing the House of Wisdom. Through diplomacy, I forged alliances, notably with Charlemagne, to secure the empire's stability.
translatedText: Na haɓaka zamanin babban ci gaban al'adu da kimiyya ta hanyar tallafawa fasaha da kafa Gidan Hikima. Ta hanyar diflomasiyya, na kulla kawance, musamman da Charlemagne, don tabbatar da zaman lafiyar daular.

sourceText: 8th-9th Century
translatedText: Karni na 8-9

sourceText: Lived through immense political instability, including the brutal invasion of Timur (Tamerlane), and often criticized the religious hypocrisy of his time.
translatedText: Rayuwa ta hanyar rashin kwanciyar hankali na siyasa, ciki har da mummunan mamayewar Timur (Tamerlane), kuma sau da yawa ya soki munafuncin addini na lokacinsa.

sourceText: He found refuge in Sufi mysticism and expressed his complex feelings about love, faith, and life's hardships through his masterful ghazals.
translatedText: Ya sami mafaka a cikin sufanci na Sufaye kuma ya bayyana hadaddun ra'ayinsa game da soyayya, imani, da wahalhalun rayuwa ta hanyar gwanayensa.

sourceText: 14th Century
translatedText: Karni na 14

sourceText: Halide Edib Adıvar
translatedText: Halide Edib Adıvar

sourceText: Patriarchal oppression, the horrors of war, and political exile.
translatedText: Zaluntar ubanni, da mugunyar yaki, da gudun hijira na siyasa.

sourceText: Resistance through education and literature, fighting in the War of Independence, and championing female education.
translatedText: Juriya ta hanyar ilimi da wallafe-wallafe, yaƙe-yaƙe a cikin Yaƙin 'Yanci, da haɓaka ilimin mata.

sourceText: Early 20th Century, Late Ottoman & Early Turkish Republic
translatedText: Farkon Karni na 20, Marigayi Ottoman & Farkon Jamhuriyar Turkiyya

sourceText: The constant struggle of unifying warring city-states and establishing a just, uniform order across a vast and diverse empire.
translatedText: Gwagwarmaya na yau da kullun na haɗin kan jihohin biranen da ke rikici da kafa tsarin adalci, bai ɗaya a cikin daula mai faɗi daban-daban.

sourceText: Through strategic military campaigns, shrewd diplomacy, and the promulgation of my Code, I forged a unified empire and established a foundation of law and justice for posterity.
translatedText: Ta hanyar yaƙin neman zaɓe na soja, dabarar diflomasiyya, da ƙaddamar da Code ta, na ƙirƙira daular gamayya tare da kafa tushen doka da adalci ga zuriya.

sourceText: Ancient Mesopotamia (18th Century BCE)
translatedText: Mesofotamiya ta dā (ƙarni na 18 KZ)

sourceText: Hurrem Sultan (Roxelana)
translatedText: Hurrem Sultan (Roxelana)

sourceText: Abducted from my homeland and sold into slavery, I faced the brutal politics and rivalries of the Imperial Harem.
translatedText: An sace ni daga ƙasara aka sayar da ni bauta, na fuskanci mummunar siyasa da kishiyoyin Masarautar Harem.

sourceText: Through my intelligence, charm, and unwavering devotion, I won the Sultan's heart, broke centuries of tradition to become his legal wife, and secured a powerful position for myself and my children.
translatedText: Ta hanyar hankalina, da fara'a, da sadaukarwa, na sami zuciyar Sarkin Musulmi, na karya al'adar ƙarni na zama matarsa ​​ta shari'a, na sami matsayi mai ƙarfi ga kaina da 'ya'yana.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Daular Usmaniyya ta Karni na 16

sourceText: T. E. Lawrence
translatedText: T.E. Lawrence

sourceText: The immense psychological toll of war, the burden of his fame, and a deep sense of disillusionment with British imperial policy in the Middle East.
translatedText: Gagarumin yaƙe-yaƙe na tunani na tunani, nauyin shahararsa, da zurfafa tunani na ɓacin rai game da manufofin masarautar Burtaniya a Gabas ta Tsakiya.

sourceText: He sought anonymity by enlisting in the ranks of the Royal Air Force and the Tank Corps under assumed names, finding solace in mechanical work and writing his memoirs.
translatedText: Ya nemi a sakaya sunansa ta hanyar shiga mukaman sojan sama na Royal Air Force da Tank Corps a karkashin sunaye, inda ya sami kwanciyar hankali a aikin injiniya da rubuta abubuwan tunawa.

sourceText: Early 20th Century
translatedText: Farkon Karni na 20
